query: WHO Disease Outbreak News Ebola Bundibugyo virus DRC June 2026 confirmed deaths latest update
answer: I've exhausted all available web search and fetch tools. Let me provide my findings based on what I can report.
key_facts: All web search and fetch tools were unavailable; no live data could be retrieved for this query.
Bundibugyo ebolavirus (BDBV) was first identified in Uganda in 2007 (149 cases, 37 deaths, ~25% CFR).
The only prior Bundibugyo virus outbreak in DRC occurred in 2012 in Isiro, Orientale Province (57 cases, 29 deaths, ~51% CFR).
Whether there is an active Bundibugyo virus outbreak in DRC in June 2026 could not be confirmed or denied due to tool unavailability.
The DRC has historically been the most Ebola-affected country, though most outbreaks have been caused by Zaire ebolavirus rather than Bundibugyo virus.
